data.name: Cowgirl's Café
data.detailed_description:
藍圖


關於此遊戲

Cow's Girl Café invites you to immerse yourself in a world where your management skills and your ability to get to know girls better are essential. Your goal will be to interact with two charming girls, vital to the production of milk that you will use to satisfy your demanding customers.

Milking girls
Once you gain enough confidence, you can milk the girls for precious milk. Milking is a process that requires attention and precision to ensure the quality of the product. and will be the main currency of the game


Mini stories with girls
Interact with the girls through meaningful dialogue to understand their personalities, and delve deeper into the story and characters within the café


expansion and improvements
Use your earnings to purchase advanced milking machinery, which will increase the speed and quantity of milk collected

Orders
Take orders from the café's customers, each with specific requests. The goal is to complete the requests in time to get money for milk.

Deliveries
Deliver fresh milk to customers who cannot visit your café.
Unlock and send new girls on milk deliveries to earn money passively.

Gift
give girls their favorite type of objects to increase their affection towards you!

data.short_description: Welcome to Cow's Girl Café, an engaging incremental game that will transport you to a one-of-a-kind coffee shop. Your mission? Running a coffee shop where fresh milk is the secret ingredient to success, coming directly from two special girls.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

  • OS: Windows 10 64bit OS
